MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin Gilbert, Esq. of Meyers Nave Riback Silver & Wilson, Tel. 510.808.2000, appearing for defendant and moving party by telephone;
Juan Victoria, Esq. of McNicholas & McNicholas LP, Tel. 310.474.1582, appearing for plaintiff via court call.

The matter was discussed. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT, RICHARD CURCI's Motion To Compel And Request For Sanctions - No opposition filed. Motion to compel responses to supplemental interrogatories (set one) and supplemental request for production (set one) granted. Motion to deem requests for admissions (set two) granted. Plaintiff shall pay sanctions of $875 to Defendant SFUSD. The responses shall be provided and the sanctions paid within ten days of notice of this order. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Mark Schreiber; Not reported
